headlines.title: West Asia war LIVE: Israel army says territory being targeted by Iranian missiles
Israel says Iran launched a missile at it, in a first during fragile ceasefire
Kuwait and Bahrain targeted by Iran after exchange of fire with US
Trump news at a glance: Iran war pushing millions into hunger, UN says, as president struggles to reach peace deal
What's next for the War Powers Resolution on Iran? PolitiFact explains

notes: S&P 500 and Nasdaq posted their worst daily drops since October on Friday, driven by a broad tech selloff and a stronger-than-expected May jobs report dampening rate-cut hopes.
VIX spiked nearly 40% amid rising geopolitical tensions and shifting interest rate expectations.
Escalating military exchanges between the US, Israel, and Iran have sparked global concerns over an escalating Middle East conflict and potential oil supply disruptions.
